headline: 3M Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: The 3M Company Board of Directors (NYSE:MMM) today declared a dividend on the company's common stock of $0.78 per share for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend is payable June 12, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 22, 2026.

headline: 3M Annual Meeting Results
summary: At today's Annual Meeting of Shareholders, 3M (NYSE:MMM) shareholders overwhelmingly supported each of the proposals recommended for approval by the company.

headline: 3M Expands AI Data Center Push With New Optical Connectivity Partnership
summary: 3M joins a new initiative to develop open AI data center connectivity standards, MMM stock trades lower Tuesday.

raw.headline: 3M Expands AI Data Center Push With New Optical Connectivity Partnership
raw.summary: 3M joins a new initiative to develop open AI data center connectivity standards, MMM stock trades lower Tuesday.

headline: New coalition launches to advance and scale optical connections for AI data centers
summary: 3M (NYSE: MMM) today announced it has joined a group of leading technology companies to establish a new multi-source agreement (MSA) focused on advancing open, interoperable specifications for expanded beam optical (EBO) connectivity in AI infrastructure. Expanded beam optical technology is increasingly seen as a critical enabler for AI infrastructure, offering advantages in reliability, ease of maintenance, and performance in high-density environments.
